title: Design editor canvas context menu component with keyboard and position handling
purpose: Provides a right-click context menu for the design editor canvas with actions for selection manipulation, grouping, alignment, and distribution. Handles mouse and keyboard events to manage menu visibility and position.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named DesignContextMenu that manages its own state through a zustand store and handles global event listeners for menu dismissal.

steps.content: Subscribe to context menu and selected IDs from the design editor store.
Set up global click and keyboard event listeners to dismiss the menu.
Calculate and clamp menu position to viewport boundaries.
Build the menu item list based on selection state and node types.
Render the menu UI with appropriate styling and item handlers.
Clear the context menu state in the store.
IF the escape key is pressed, stop event propagation and clear the context menu state.
Calculate the current menu bounding rectangle.
IF the menu extends beyond the right viewport edge, adjust x position to fit.
IF the menu extends beyond the bottom viewport edge, adjust y position to fit.
